novel_features.name: Multi-week trend rollup
novel_features.description: Aggregate strain, recovery, or sleep across multiple ISO weeks with mean/min/max.
novel_features.rationale: Local SQLite + in-process bucketing — no Whoop endpoint exists for cross-week summaries.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Coaching prompts and agent loops need rollups, not raw cycles.

novel_features.name: Coach digest
novel_features.description: Markdown or JSON shareable summary of the last N days for sharing with a coach or LLM.
novel_features.rationale: Local synthesis from synced sleep/recovery/cycle/workout rows.
novel_features.why_it_matters: One-shot human/agent-readable status without rebuilding context every time.

novel_features.name: Workout misclassification flagger
novel_features.description: Flag workouts whose HR shape looks inconsistent with their declared sport_id (heuristic).
novel_features.rationale: Whoop manual sport tagging is lossy; HR profile shape is informative.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Surface mislabeled sessions that skew strain interpretation.

novel_features.name: Cross-metric correlation
novel_features.description: Pearson correlation between two daily metrics (e.g. sleep_efficiency and recovery_score) over a window.
novel_features.rationale: Whoop API returns raw rows but no pairwise stats; common athlete question.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Lets agents answer 'does sleep efficiency predict my recovery?' without an external notebook.

novel_features.name: Sleep debt + recovery prediction
novel_features.description: Rolling 14-day sleep debt accumulation and a heuristic recovery prediction for tomorrow.
novel_features.rationale: No native Whoop endpoint; computable from synced sleep cycles.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Forward-looking signal, not just historical reporting.

novel_features.name: Strain budget recommender
novel_features.description: Recommend today's strain ceiling given a weekly strain target and current recovery score.
novel_features.rationale: Combines recovery + week-to-date strain; no Whoop endpoint.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Actionable training-load guidance instead of raw scores.

novel_features.name: Week-over-week diff
novel_features.description: Compare two ISO weeks side-by-side: strain, recovery, sleep deltas with percent change.
novel_features.rationale: Pure local aggregation across two windows.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Quickly answers 'how did this week compare to last week?'

novel_features.name: Webhook listener with shell hook
novel_features.description: Run a local HTTP server that receives Whoop webhook POSTs (HMAC-validated) and runs a configurable shell command per event.
novel_features.rationale: Whoop ships webhooks but provides no CLI receiver; HMAC validation reduces footgun risk.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Make Whoop events trigger local automations without spinning up a Lambda.

novel_features.name: Journal cross-reference
novel_features.description: Cross-reference Whoop Journal answers (sleep aids, alcohol, stress) against next-day recovery deltas.
novel_features.rationale: Journal data is per-cycle; Whoop has no native correlation endpoint.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Lets users (and agents) ground self-experiments in their own data.
